title: Two Sum
description:
Given an array of integers `nums` and an integer `target`, return the indices of the two numbers that add up to `target`.

You may assume that each input has exactly one solution, and you may not use the same element twice. The order of the returned indices doesn't matter.
hints: Brute force: try every pair. O(n²).
Can you remember numbers you've seen so each lookup is O(1)?
A hash map lets you check 'have I seen target - nums[i]?' instantly.
